source: current upstream litex-boards through local openXC7 patches
blocker: The upstream CRG always instantiates S7IDELAYCTRL. With SDRAM skipped through integrated main RAM, openXC7 sees IDELAYCTRL but no I/ODELAYs and errors.
next_decision: Use a separate non-DDR JTAG-only patched source that removes IDELAYCTRL only for this proof target.
